personal.name: Rakshitha R
personal.title: Computer Science Engineer | IoT & Cybersecurity Enthusiast
personal.tagline: Building secure, intelligent systems through innovation in cybersecurity, IoT, and emerging technologies.
personal.bio: I'm a motivated Computer Science Engineering student specializing in IoT, Cybersecurity, and Blockchain. I have a strong foundation in secure application development, problem-solving, and building innovative tech solutions. I am passionate about leveraging technology to create scalable, reliable, and secure systems.
personal.currentRoleDescription: Pursuing B.E. in Computer Science with a focus on IoT, Cybersecurity, and Blockchain. Actively working on projects related to security, automation, and intelligent systems.

about.title: About
sections: I am a Computer Science Engineering student with a strong interest in Cybersecurity, IoT, and Blockchain technologies. My goal is to build secure and intelligent systems that solve real-world problems.
I have hands-on experience developing projects in Python, IoT systems, and secure file handling. I enjoy working on practical solutions that combine security, automation, and innovation.
Beyond academics, I actively participate in coding competitions, cybersecurity workshops, and technical events to continuously improve my skills and stay updated with emerging technologies.

experience.title: Computer Science Engineering Student
experience.company: Alva’s Institute of Engineering and Technology, Mijar
experience.description: Pursuing B.E. in Computer Science (IoT & Cybersecurity including Blockchain). Actively involved in academic projects, technical learning, and skill development in cybersecurity and cloud technologies.

projects.title: SecretVault — Secure File Management System
projects.description: A secure system to encrypt and decrypt confidential files.
projects.longDescription: Developed a Python-based secure vault for protecting sensitive files using encryption techniques. Implemented password-based authentication and focused on ensuring data privacy and integrity.

projects.title: Voice-Activated Personal Assistant
projects.description: A voice-controlled assistant for system tasks and queries.
projects.longDescription: Built a voice-driven assistant using Python, APIs, and speech recognition. Designed the system for modularity, privacy, and ease of use, enabling automation of daily tasks.

projects.title: Gas Leakage Call Alert System
projects.description: An IoT-based gas leak detection and alert system.
projects.longDescription: Designed an IoT safety system using Arduino, MQ sensor, and GSM module to detect gas leaks and send real-time SMS alerts, improving safety and emergency response.

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering (B.E.), Computer Science (IoT & Cybersecurity including Blockchain)
education.institution: Alva’s Institute of Engineering and Technology, Mijar
